target_region.design_consequence: All resources deploy in us-west-2; Bedrock availability verified

compliance.prompt: Do you have any compliance or regulatory requirements?
compliance.design_consequence: Tier 1 security baseline only; no Config/Security Hub add-on

gcp_monthly_spend.prompt: Approximately how much are you spending on GCP per month in total?
gcp_monthly_spend.design_consequence: Dev-tier sizing baseline for cost comparison

availability.prompt: Detected: Cloud SQL ZONAL → single-AZ availability

cutover_strategy.prompt: When can you accept downtime for cutover?
cutover_strategy.design_consequence: Phased cutover in week 3 during declared maintenance window

cloud_run_traffic_pattern.prompt: How does traffic to your Cloud Run services vary?
cloud_run_traffic_pattern.design_consequence: Fargate hours estimate (~511 hrs/mo) in Balanced tier

ai_priority.prompt: What matters most for your AI workloads?
ai_priority.design_consequence: Claude Sonnet 4.6 recommended over lower-cost models

startup_program_status.prompt: Are you eligible for AWS startup programs?
startup_program_status.design_consequence: Up to $5K AWS Activate credits callout in report
